name: VILLAGE SUPER MARKET INC
summary: Village Super Market, Inc. operates supermarkets under the ShopRite banner and Gourmet Garage specialty markets. The company sells center store products, fresh items, pharmacy products, and other goods. Headquartered in Springfield, New Jersey, it is a New Jersey corporation trading on NASDAQ under the ticker VLGEA. The company operates stores leased from related-party real estate partnerships and affiliated entities.

products.name: Center Store Products
products.description: Traditional grocery and packaged goods sold in supermarket center aisles.

products.name: Fresh Products
products.description: Fresh produce, meat, seafood, and perishable grocery items.

products.name: Pharmacy
products.description: In-store pharmacy services and prescription products.

products.name: Gourmet Garage Specialty Markets
products.description: Specialty grocery retail format offering gourmet and specialty food products.

partnerships.description: Company holds an investment interest in InsureRite Ltd. as an investee entity.
